data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"3601-f085","generatedAt":"2026-04-10T00:00:00Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Eliminate all plugins/dso self-references from distributed plugin files","description":"The DSO plugin is designed to be installed by host projects at any path. Every hardcoded plugins/dso string inside a distributed file becomes a broken reference in the host environment. This epic eliminates all self-references category by category and locks the constraint with an enforcement hook.","successCriteria":["grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches","A project-local pre-commit hook blocks commits that introduce plugins/dso into any file under plugins/dso/, with a passing test","All scripts use _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and pass a test confirming resolution from both shim and direct invocation contexts","All agent and skill markdown files that reference plugin-internal paths use the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix"]},"stories":[{"id":"075a-b781","title":"As a plugin operator, script file comments accurately describe the plugin without hardcoded install paths","description":"Replace # plugins/dso/... header comments with # filename and reword shim-exempt markers in .sh/.py files","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["grep -rn # .*plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches on comment lines","shim-exempt markers reworded without hardcoded path","unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Scope boundary] Verification grep targets comment lines only \u2014 non-comment occurrences are S2 scope"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches"},{"id":"af9e-77fc","title":"As a plugin operator, scripts resolve sibling plugin files portably regardless of install path","description":"Migrate runtime path constructions to _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern; annotate git-relative pattern matching with plugin-self-ref-ok","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["All .sh scripts declare _PLUGIN_ROOT canonical pattern","_PLUGIN_ROOT resolves from both shim and direct invocation","git-relative patterns annotated with plugin-self-ref-ok","unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Validate from both CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT set and direct invocation","[Reliability] _PLUGIN_ROOT fallback handles non-standard working directories","[Maintainability] Consistent _PLUGIN_ROOT declaration across all scripts","[Scope boundary] Git-relative patterns cannot use _PLUGIN_ROOT \u2014 annotate instead","[Technical debt] deps.sh resolve_repo_root() ../../ assumption about install depth"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"All scripts use _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and pass a test"},{"id":"ccc3-954a","title":"As a plugin operator, agent and skill documentation references plugin files portably","description":"Replace plugins/dso/... with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/... in runtime-path lines in .md files; use relative form for human-readable prose","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ returns zero matches on runtime-path lines","human-readable prose uses plugin-root-relative paths","unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Scope boundary] Distinguish runtime paths (convert), human prose (relative form), git commands (stay as-is)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"All agent and skill markdown files use the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix"},{"id":"7eb8-af48","title":"As a plugin maintainer, new commits are blocked from re-introducing plugins/dso self-references","description":"Create .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh with plugin-self-ref-ok suppression support; verify zero unannotated occurrences","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["commits with unannotated plugins/dso in plugins/dso/ files are blocked","plugin-self-ref-ok annotated lines pass without blocking","grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns only annotated lines","unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Test both blocking and pass-through cases","[Reliability] Hook works in local dev and CI"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["075a-b781","af9e-77fc","ccc3-954a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches; pre-commit hook blocks introduction"},{"id":"2fbd-f6b8","title":"Update project docs to reflect plugin portability migration and enforcement hook","description":"Update CLAUDE.md, system-landscape.md, llms.txt with _PLUGIN_ROOT convention and enforcement hook","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md documents _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and plugin-self-ref-ok suppression","system-landscape.md Plugin Distribution Boundary section updated","llms.txt includes enforcement hook entry"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7eb8-af48"],"satisfiesCriterion":"grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/ returns zero matches"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":5,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["af9e-77fc","7eb8-af48","2fbd-f6b8"]}}
